top_signals.title: Bayer Shares Hinge On Two Court Decisions After $60 Billion Rout
top_signals.summary: Bayer AG shares are facing a make-or-break few weeks, with two upcoming court developments key to stemming a more than $60 billion wipeout in market value since the German company’s ill-fated purchase of Monsanto eight years ago.
